history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B and facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would go to row 02 column C, which is lava, so that is unsafe. I should turn clockwise to face down, which will let me move toward the open path below.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B and facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead is row 03 column B, which is safe (`.`), so moving forward progresses me toward the goal at row 04 column D while avoiding the lava at row 02 column C.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D, but moving straight down would lead to row 04 column B, which is safe but not directly to the goal. To get closer to the goal, I should first turn right to face column C, and then move toward the goal while avoiding the lava at row 04 column C. Since turning right from down means a clockwise rotation, I will rotate clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B, facing left (`<`). The cell to my left is a wall, so I cannot move forward safely. The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, which is to my right and one row down. A good next step is to turn clockwise so I face down, allowing me to move toward the lower path without stepping into lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B and facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 02 column B, which is safe but not toward the goal. To get closer to the goal, I should face right toward column D, and from facing up, turning clockwise will make me face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B and facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D, but moving forward would take me to row 03 column C, which is safe, while going straight toward the goal from here would eventually require passing near lava. A safe immediate move is to go forward into the empty cell.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column C facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, which is one step down and one step right, but moving right would lead toward column D on the current row, then I can adjust. The safest immediate move is to continue forward to row 03 column D, which is a floor cell and brings me closer to the goal without touching lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is directly below me at row 04 column D, so moving forward would not help because I am facing right. I need to turn clockwise to face down, then I can move toward the goal safely without stepping on lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is directly below me at row 04 column D, and that cell is safe. So I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
